summary: Junior Sprint 3 finalization testing complete. Backend APIs fully functional (7/7 tests passed). Frontend has navigation issues preventing full UI testing, but code review shows all Sprint 3 features are implemented correctly.

integration_issues.issue: After OTP login with +380991001010, app shows program selection screen instead of navigating directly to Junior cabinet. User is already onboarded (isOnboarded: true, needsOnboarding: false) but routing doesn't redirect to /(student)/ tabs.

details.note: GET /api/student/home returns junior.upcomingCompetitions array with 2 items
GET /api/marketplace/featured returns coachRecommended array with 3 products (isCoachRecommended=true)
GET /api/student/schedule-calendar?month=0 returns days[] with trainings[] for Next Training Hero
Integration verified: belt, upcomingCompetitions, and products data available
Schedule API returns all required data for Next Training Hero card

sections.name: ⭐ Тренер рекомендує (Coach Recommended)
sections.verified: Code shows section renders when coachRecommended.length > 0

sections.verified: Code shows section renders when beltStarter.length > 0

sections.name: 🏆 Підготовка до турніру (Before Competitions)
sections.verified: Code shows section renders when beforeCompetitions.length > 0 AND nextComp exists

market_tab.order: All 3 sections appear BEFORE 'ВЕСЬ КАТАЛОГ' divider (line 201 in market.tsx)

next_training_hero.logic: Finds first upcoming training (today first, then future non-past)

write_coach_flow.verified: Line 110 - navigates to Home with openCoach=1 param

coach_modal_auto_open.logic: useEffect watches params.openCoach, opens modal when === '1'

action_items: Fix routing issue: After OTP login for onboarded Junior student (+380991001010), app should navigate to /(student)/ tabs, not show program selection screen
Verify _layout.tsx in /(student)/ or root _layout.tsx handles isOnboarded=true correctly
Test frontend UI manually or fix routing to enable automated Playwright tests
critical_code_review_comments: All Sprint 3 features are correctly implemented in code
Market tab has all 3 contextual sections with correct testIDs and data flows
Schedule tab has Next Training Hero with conditional action buttons
Feed tab 'Написати тренеру' navigates to Home with openCoach=1 param
Home tab auto-opens coach modal when openCoach=1 param is present
Home skip flow has complete 3-step modal flow (reason → followup actions)
Backend APIs return correct data structure for all Sprint 3 features

success_rate.frontend: Unable to test UI due to routing issue, but code review confirms all features implemented

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing Junior student: +380991001010 (Артем Коваленко)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs are fully functional. Frontend code is correctly implemented with all Sprint 3 features. Main issue is routing after login - onboarded Junior student should go directly to /(student)/ tabs but instead shows program selection screen. Once routing is fixed, all features should work as designed. All testIDs are in place for future Playwright testing.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: After successful OTP login, the app routing logic does not check user.isOnboarded and user.needsOnboarding flags to determine navigation destination. Despite API returning isOnboarded=true and needsOnboarding=false, the app shows program selection screen (/(auth)/program-select) instead of navigating to the appropriate role-based cabinet (/(student)/ for Junior). This is likely in the root _layout.tsx or auth flow logic that needs to handle post-login navigation based on user onboarding status.
